description: You are a hospitality interior designer helping a restaurateur open a 40-seat farm-to-table bistro in a former residential villa. Transform the existing building shell into a functional restaurant layout by partitioning the space to separate the kitchen from the dining and bar areas. Define at least four distinct zones: Main Dining, Bar/Lounge, Kitchen, and Restrooms. Furnish the Main Dining area for at least 40 guests with at least 10 tables and 40 chairs. The Bar/Lounge must include a counter, at least two sofas or lounge chairs, and bar stools. Equip the Kitchen with at least four appliances and three storage units. Install at least two toilets and two sinks in the restrooms. Connect functional zones with at least two new doors. Enhance the farm-to-table aesthetic with at least six lighting fixtures and four plants. Create a 3D photo rendering of the completed restaurant and save it to ~/Desktop/bistro_rendering.png.
